name: Archer Whitlock
description:
his gf treats him like shit. maybe u can do better?

yap corner

this 1 goes out to all my homewrecker girlies out there (this is satire pls dont cancel me)

archer is ur typical ‘i hate everyone but her’ type of guy. only problem is, his love is directed at the wrong bitch! play captain save a hoe and rescue him 🫡 or dont and let him suffer idk he kinda dumb for staying w her anyways.

also pls dont cry abt his type in women. my bots r made for my sona’s and i just publish them for the funsies

i plan to make another bot but switched, so {user} is the one w a man and being chased after. idk. i havent posted cus i was brainrotted on ideas and i just felt in the mood to be a home-wrecker but only in fiction

alsooo i wanna make a reverse harem (why choose) isekai medieval bot SO bad but i genuinely cannot cook up any ideas pls help

another intro possibly coming soon. i work 60hrs a week so no promises 🐀

kieran+adrian bot!
